# Teamz Lab Tools

> 2266+ free browser-based tools and calculators. All tools run client-side with zero data collection, no login, and no server processing. Covers finance, health, developer utilities, AI writing, design, and country-specific calculators across 113 categories.

- Website: https://tool.teamzlab.com
- Full tool index: https://tool.teamzlab.com/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://tool.teamzlab.com/sitemap.xml

## Popular Tools

- [BMI Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/evergreen/bmi-calculator/): Body mass index with health categories
- [QR Code Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/evergreen/qr-code-generator/): QR codes for URLs, text, Wi-Fi, vCard
- [JSON Formatter](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dev/json-formatter/): Format, validate, and beautify JSON
- [Typing Speed Test](https://tool.teamzlab.com/tools/typing-speed-test/): WPM test with accuracy tracking
- [Age Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/evergreen/age-calculator/): Exact age in years, months, days
- [Tip Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/restaurant/tip-calculator/): Tip amount and bill splitting
- [Personal Loan Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/evergreen/personal-loan-calculator/): Monthly payments and amortization
- [AI Text Summarizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/ai/article-summarizer/): Summarize text privately in-browser
- [Resume ATS Checker](https://tool.teamzlab.com/career/ats-resume-checker/): ATS compatibility scoring
- [Scientific Calculator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/evergreen/scientific-calculator/): Trig, logs, constants, and expressions
- [Pomodoro Timer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/evergreen/pomodoro-timer/): Focus timer with work/break cycles
- [Color Palette Generator](https://tool.teamzlab.com/dev/color-palette-generator/): Harmonious palettes from any color
- [Image Resizer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/image/image-resizer/): Resize images locally, never uploaded
- [Countdown Timer](https://tool.teamzlab.com/tools/countdown-timer/): Timer with presets and alarm
- [Stopwatch](https://tool.teamzlab.com/tools/stopwatch/): Stopwatch with lap times

## AlwaysReady Care — Care Home Compliance SaaS

Free care home compliance software covering 14 countries and 13 regulatory frameworks (CQC, ACQS, NZS 8134, HIQA, MD/QPR, CMS, HAS, MHLW, DoH/MoHAP, IGJ, IVO, Provincial CA, IMSERSO). Continuous evidence capture, real-time readiness scoring, inspection pack generation. AI-tagged to regulator criteria.

- [AlwaysReady Care — UK / England](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/): CQC compliance for UK care homes — 5 Key Questions, KLOEs, Reg 17 evidence tracking
- [AlwaysReady Care — Australia](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/au/): ACQS Aged Care Quality Standards readiness, 8 Standards, Quality Indicators
- [AlwaysReady Care — New Zealand](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nz/): Ngā Paerewa NZS 8134:2021 audit readiness, 4 Pae quality domains
- [AlwaysReady Care — Ireland](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ie/): HIQA inspection readiness for designated centres, 13 most-flagged areas
- [AlwaysReady Care — Germany (Deutsch)](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de/): MD-Prüfung & Pflegegrad, 24.700+ Qualitätsprüfungen, Expertenstandards, SIS
- [AlwaysReady Care — Germany (English)](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/de-en/): MD audit prep + QPR framework support for German care providers in English
- [AlwaysReady Care — United States](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/us/): CMS Five-Star Quality Rating + state survey F-tag evidence tracking — waitlist
- [AlwaysReady Care — France](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/fr/): HAS Qualiscope évaluation externe, 157 critères dont 18 impératifs — liste d attente
- [AlwaysReady Care — Japan](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/jp/): MHLW介護保険・実地指導/運営指導対応のエビデンス管理 — ウェイティングリスト
- [AlwaysReady Care — UAE](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ae/): DoH Abu Dhabi + MoHAP healthcare facility licensing & compliance — waitlist
- [AlwaysReady Care — Netherlands](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/nl/): IGJ verpleeghuiszorg toezicht + Kwaliteitskader Verpleeghuiszorg — wachtlijst
- [AlwaysReady Care — Sweden](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/se/): IVO tillsyn äldreomsorg + SoL/LSS-stöd för SÄBO och hemtjänst — väntelista
- [AlwaysReady Care — Canada](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/ca/): Provincial LTC inspection (Ontario CARES, BC, Alberta, Quebec) — bilingual EN/FR — waitlist
- [AlwaysReady Care — Spain](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/es/): IMSERSO + 17 comunidades autónomas inspecciones residencias mayores — lista de espera

### AlwaysReady Care — Free Tools & Resources

- [CQC Inspection Checklist](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/inspection-checklist/): Free interactive 30-item CQC inspection checklist with live scoring
- [CQC Inspection Countdown](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/cqc-inspection-countdown/): Predict your next CQC inspection window from your last rating + concerns
- [Inspection Statistics 2025](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/inspection-statistics/): CQC, ACQS, MD, HIQA, HealthCERT 2025 stats compared in one page with sources
- [5 Key Questions Framework](https://tool.teamzlab.com/apps/always-ready-care/framework/): CQC Single Assessment Framework guide — Safe, Effective, Caring, Responsive, Well-led
